series_metadata.series_title: Annual Agency Credit Card Billing Invoice File
series_metadata.series_description: Copies of Credit Card Annual Billing Invoices for each user agency consisting of the agency name, credit card account number, number of cards on the account, rate calculation and the total annual charge.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in operating area for Two (2) Fiscal Years, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain until stored electronically, then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Recycle
